title: Instruction Block Front-Matter (optional YAML)
description: Schema for optional YAML front-matter in agent instruction block files. Front-matter is delimited by --- and stripped before output/hashing. The v1 spec defines 'tags' as the recognized key; unknown keys are preserved but do not affect compilation.

tags.description: Array of topic tags (reserved for future topic index). Editing tags does NOT bump target version.

additionalPropertiesDescription: Unknown keys are preserved in the lock file but otherwise ignored and do not affect output or hashing.
notes: Front-matter block must be delimited by --- at start and end.
Example usage in a fragment file:
Run the full test suite with npm test.
Empty front-matter (just ---, no content) is valid but has no effect.
